typography.display: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Cascadia Code", "Liberation Mono", monospace
typography.body: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Cascadia Code", "Liberation Mono", monospace

notes: Hand-tuned outside the default Anglesite generators. Typography is mono-everywhere (no serif/sans pairing) to match the Gen-X-to-Gen-Z RFC/textfiles/htmx aesthetic register. Shape is hairline-zero (no radius, no shadows) for the same brutalist-but-readable posture. Palette is single-accent (amber only); accent is a slightly brighter amber for decorative use, brand is the contrast-passing amber for body/links. Dark mode (prefers-color-scheme: dark) flips to phosphor amber on warm near-black.
